title: Th4rn's Kaos
description: Adds "Kaos" with new entities, structures, ores, etc.
body:
**WARNING!**
MOD IS NOT MEANT FOR USE YET, THIS WAS UPLOADED TO MAKE IT EASIER FOR THE FIRST BETA/RELEASE

![Title of the Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44d89c617cfce0dfa301477d1995604dcb9d2212.png)
is an adventurous mod that mainly adds chaos to the world with mobs and equipment. You can find undiscovered ores and use them to their full potential. Think of this mod as a chaotic expansion to normal Minecraft.

_Scroll down for full content list_

### Land of Inamorta
There is a civilization that takes the name "Inamorta." They consist of a type of human called "Order." They use gold as currency and are stuck in a medieval period, using swords, spears, bows, and even magic. They are neutral , but don't make them mad.
### Evolved Illagers
Illagers are getting smarter ; they are starting to mimic the enemy to trick them . They are beginning to use new tools and methods to gain an advantage over their foes.
